title: The pilots, in the open
note: The work behind these cards is public — real pages, real files, no login. Open any of them.

pilots.name: Landing page
pilots.blurb: One Figma frame became a live page in two languages — each one a real page a search engine can find.

pilots.name: SEO, generated
pilots.blurb: The search index the agent writes by itself. Nobody hand-codes it.

pilots.name: Email agent
pilots.blurb: A Figma design turned into an email that holds up in Outlook and dark mode — with a step-by-step guide anyone can follow.

pilots.name: A/B testing
pilots.blurb: The operations guide for running the test-and-learn loop from hypothesis to winner.
